name: laundry-license-generator
description: Internal license generator for LaundryPro Desktop Management System

scripts.license:generate: npm run build && node dist/index.js generate
scripts.license:verify: npm run build && node dist/index.js verify
scripts.license:list: npm run build && node dist/index.js list
scripts.license:revoke: npm run build && node dist/index.js revoke
scripts.license:extend: npm run build && node dist/index.js extend
scripts.license:batch: npm run build && node dist/index.js batch
scripts.license:keys: npm run build && node dist/index.js keys

author: LaundryPro Team
